subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits are a twisted realm of the Underdark.
source_quote: A twisted realm of the Underdark

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is Maram il Vass's refuge located in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: Maram il Vass's refuge, the Den of the Whispered Word, is located

subject: Thieves Guild
fact: The Thieves Guild is based in Hillsfar with Isthana as its head.
source_quote: The head of the Thieves Guild in Hillsfar

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is pragmatic and opportunistic.
source_quote: She is pragmatic and opportunistic

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana sees the recent chaos and death of the ruling elite as creating many opportunities for her guild.
source_quote: seeing the recent chaos and death of the ruling elite as creating many opportunities for her guild

subject: gear acquisition
fact: Isthana helps the party acquire new armor and magical items from the castle's stores.
source_quote: She helps the party acquire new armor and magical items from the castle's stores

subject: political power offer
fact: Isthana offers the party political power in Hillsfar.
source_quote: offers them political power in Hillsfar

subject: power offer refusal
fact: The party declines the offer of political power in Hillsfar.
source_quote: which they decline

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: Charles is a messenger from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: A messenger from the Emerald Enclave

subject: La Résistance
fact: Charles is a member of La Résistance.
source_quote: and member of La Résistance

subject: Charles
fact: Charles is known for his dramatic and somewhat over-the-top demeanor.
source_quote: known for his dramatic and somewhat over-the-top demeanor

subject: victory congratulation
fact: Charles congratulates the party on their victory.
source_quote: He congratulates the party on their victory

subject: Graz'zt news delivery
fact: Charles delivers urgent news about Graz'zt infusing fire giants with power.
source_quote: delivers urgent news about Graz'zt infusing fire giants with power

subject: meeting direction
fact: Charles directs the party to meet with Drow representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave.
source_quote: He directs the party to meet with Drow representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv has silver hair, thick sideburns, and emerald green eyes.
source_quote: A Drow representative with silver hair, thick sideburns, emerald green eyes

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv has skin so dark it's nearly purple.
source_quote: and skin so dark it's nearly purple

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is dressed in a black shirt and pants with a sword at his side.
source_quote: Dressed in black shirt and pants with a sword at his side

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv represents Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: he represents Solom Ned'razak

subject: Drow meeting
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv meets the party at the Silver Shadow Cave.
source_quote: meets the party at the Silver Shadow Cave

subject: Drow plight explanation
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv explains the Drow's plight to the party.
source_quote: He explains the Drow's plight

subject: aid request
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv requests the party's aid in recovering the captured alchemist Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: and requests the party's aid in recovering the captured alchemist Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the Drow outpost of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: The leader of the Drow outpost of Szith Morcane

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is an 18th level wizard.
source_quote: an 18th level wizard

subject: outpost sack
fact: Solom Ned'razak's outpost was sacked by fire giants and demons.
source_quote: after his outpost was sacked by fire giants and demons

subject: flight to Sporedome
fact: Solom Ned'razak fled to the Sporedome after his outpost was sacked.
source_quote: who fled to the Sporedome

subject: representative dispatch
fact: Solom Ned'razak sent Murssvayas Dhuurniv to represent him.
source_quote: He sent Murssvayas Dhuurniv to represent him

subject: reward anticipation
fact: Solom Ned'razak anticipated the party would ask for a reward.
source_quote: and anticipated the party would ask for a reward

subject: reward offer
fact: Solom Ned'razak offered an item from the Drow horde upon successful completion of the mission.
source_quote: offering an item from the Drow horde upon successful completion of the mission

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the Drow's chief alchemist.
source_quote: The Drow's chief alchemist

subject: ritual work
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was working on a ritual to cull fiendish blood from the Graz'zt-infused fire giants.
source_quote: who was working on a ritual to cull fiendish blood from the Graz'zt-infused fire giants

subject: Xaven capture
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was captured during the raid on Szith Morcane.
source_quote: He was captured during the raid on Szith Morcane

subject: Xaven sale
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was sold to Maram il Vass in the Den of the Whispered Word.
source_quote: and sold to Maram il Vass in the Den of the Whispered Word

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a creature residing in the Den of the Whispered Word.
source_quote: A creature residing in the Den of the Whispered Word

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is an extraplanar brokerage in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: an extraplanar brokerage in the Howling Pits

subject: Xaven purchase
fact: Maram il Vass purchased the captured Drow alchemist Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: who purchased the captured Drow alchemist Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord.
source_quote: A demon lord

subject: Hillsfar plot thwarted
fact: Graz'zt's carefully constructed plot to destroy Hillsfar and extend his power was thwarted by the party.
source_quote: whose carefully constructed plot to destroy Hillsfar and extend his power was thwarted by the party

subject: vengeance threat
fact: Graz'zt threatened vengeance.
source_quote: He threatened vengeance

subject: fire giant infusion
fact: Graz'zt is infusing fire giants with his blood.
source_quote: is now infusing fire giants with his blood

subject: new threat creation
fact: Graz'zt's actions are creating a new threat to both the Underdark and the surface world.
source_quote: creating a new threat to both the Underdark and the surface world

subject: Malkyn Grenefeld
fact: Malkyn Grenefeld is the recently defeated antagonist.
source_quote: The recently defeated antagonist

subject: Grenefeld death
fact: Malkyn Grenefeld's death triggered the current chaos in Hillsfar and the wrath of Graz'zt.
source_quote: whose death triggered the current chaos in Hillsfar and the wrath of Graz'zt

subject: Malkyn defeat
fact: The party's victory over Malkyn Grenefeld set the current events in motion.
source_quote: The party's victory over him is what set the current events in motion

subject: Red Plume Guards
fact: The Red Plume Guards are the city guards of Hillsfar.
source_quote: The city guards of Hillsfar

subject: Red Plume Guards
fact: The Red Plume Guards are now caught between factions after the death of the ruling elite.
source_quote: now caught between factions after the death of the ruling elite

subject: castle gate confrontation
fact: The Red Plume Guards stand ready to fight the blood-spattered party at the castle gate.
source_quote: They stand ready to fight the blood-spattered party at the castle gate

subject: party passage
fact: The Red Plume Guards allow the party to pass without confrontation.
source_quote: but ultimately allow them to pass without confrontation

subject: Bracers of Archery
fact: The Bracers of Archery are magical bracers that enhance archery skills.
source_quote: Magical bracers that enhance archery skills

subject: Bracers acquisition
fact: Akritas acquired the Bracers of Archery from the castle's stores.
source_quote: acquired by Akritas from the castle's stores

subject: Oathbow
fact: The Oathbow is a powerful magical bow already wielded by Akritas.
source_quote: A powerful magical bow already wielded by Akritas

subject: Oathbow
fact: The Oathbow is noted for its exceptional strength.
source_quote: noted for its exceptional strength

subject: Studded Leather +1
fact: Studded Leather +1 is magical light armor acquired by Akritas from Isthana.
source_quote: Magical light armor acquired by Akritas from Isthana

subject: AC boost from Studded Leather
fact: The Studded Leather +1 brings Akritas's armor class to 16.
source_quote: providing enhanced protection and bringing her armor class to 16

subject: Mithral Plate
fact: Mithral Plate is light and flexible heavy armor made of mithral.
source_quote: Light and flexible heavy armor made of mithral

subject: Mithral Plate
fact: Mithral Plate does not impose disadvantage on dexterity checks.
source_quote: that does not impose disadvantage on dexterity checks

subject: Mithral Plate acquisition
fact: Bramgrim acquired the Mithral Plate from the castle.
source_quote: Acquired by Bramgrim from the castle

subject: Mithral Plate AC boost
fact: The Mithral Plate increases Bramgrim's armor class to 20.
source_quote: it increases his armor class to 20

subject: Mithral Plate stealth benefit
fact: The Mithral Plate removes stealth penalties for Bramgrim.
source_quote: while removing stealth penalties

subject: Plate Mail +1
fact: Plate Mail +1 is magical heavy armor acquired by Daein from the castle's stores.
source_quote: Magical heavy armor acquired by Daein from the castle's stores

subject: Plate Mail +1 AC boost
fact: The Plate Mail +1 increases Daein's armor class to 21.
source_quote: increasing his armor class to 21

subject: Ring of Evasion
fact: The Ring of Evasion is a magical ring possessed by Bramgrim.
source_quote: A magical ring possessed by Bramgrim

subject: Ring of Evasion
fact: The Ring of Evasion allows Bramgrim to avoid damage from certain effects.
source_quote: that allows him to avoid damage from certain effects

subject: Owlbear Scale Mail
fact: Owlbear Scale Mail is custom-made scale mail armor commissioned for the party's owlbear companion.
source_quote: Custom-made scale mail armor commissioned for the party's owlbear companion

subject: Owlbear Scale Mail cost
fact: The Owlbear Scale Mail was commissioned at a cost of 200 gold pieces.
source_quote: at a cost of 200 gold pieces

subject: Owlbear Scale Mail
fact: The Owlbear Scale Mail provides an armor class of 15.
source_quote: It provides an armor class of 15

subject: Owlbear Scale Mail crafting time
fact: The Owlbear Scale Mail takes several days to craft.
source_quote: and takes several days to craft

subject: Solom's Pendant
fact: Solom's Pendant is a pendant belonging to Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: A pendant belonging to Solom Ned'razak

subject: Pendant presentation
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv presents Solom's Pendant to prove his legitimacy as Solom's representative.
source_quote: Murssvayas Dhuurniv presents it to prove his legitimacy as Solom's representative

subject: Pendant authentication
fact: Bramgrim recognizes Solom's Pendant as authentic.
source_quote: and Bramgrim recognizes it as authentic

subject: Pass Without Trace cast
fact: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: A concentration spell cast by Akritas

subject: Pass Without Trace effect
fact: Pass Without Trace grants a plus 10 bonus to stealth checks for the caster and all allies within a 30-foot radius.
source_quote: that grants a plus 10 bonus to stealth checks for the caster and all allies within a 30-foot radius

subject: Pass Without Trace revelation
fact: The revelation of the Pass Without Trace ability shocked Daein and Bramgrim.
source_quote: The revelation of this ability shocked Daein and Bramgrim

subject: Pass Without Trace Daein bonus
fact: The party realized Pass Without Trace gives Daein a plus 20 to stealth.
source_quote: who realized it gives Daein a plus 20 to stealth

subject: Pass Without Trace owlbear bonus
fact: The party realized Pass Without Trace gives the owlbear a plus 11 to stealth.
source_quote: and the owlbear a plus 11

subject: Greater Restoration preparation
fact: Bramgrim prepares the fourth-level spell Greater Restoration.
source_quote: A fourth-level spell that Bramgrim prepares

subject: Calm Emotions preparation
fact: Bramgrim prepares the second-level spell Calm Emotions.
source_quote: A second-level spell that Bramgrim prepares

subject: Calm Emotions utility
fact: Calm Emotions is specifically mentioned as being the only thing that works on a creature referred to as 'sphere'.
source_quote: specifically mentioned as being the only thing that works on a creature referred to as 'sphere'
